forum.title: Cybersecurity Forum
forum.subtitle: Share your experiences with cyber scams and help others stay safe

create.title: Create new post

scamTypeDesc.phishing: Fake emails or websites to steal data

create.descriptionPlaceholder:
Describe in detail what happened. Include:
• How the scam was attempted
• What signs raised suspicion
• How you reacted
• What conclusions you drew

This will help others recognize similar threats.
create.tagsHint: Tags help find the post. No more than 10 tags.
create.markResolvedHint: Mark if the issue is resolved or you are sharing a resolved case.

home.heroSubtitle: Learn to recognize online scammers through interactive games and communication.
home.mission: Our mission is to equip you with knowledge for safe and confident navigation in the digital world. This is a non-profit project created for everyone.
gamesBenefits: Learning in a safe simulator environment.
Developing critical thinking to identify tricks.
Realistic scenarios: from phishing to phone scams.
communityBenefits: Ask questions and get advice from other members.
Help newcomers by sharing your knowledge.
Stay informed about new types of scams.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to become invulnerable to scammers?
home.ctaDescription: Join our free community today. Your safety is in your hands, and we will help you strengthen it.
home.footerText: Our platform is a non-profit project created by enthusiasts to increase digital literacy. All materials on the site are available absolutely free.

requireLogin.title: Authentication Required
requireLogin.desc: Log in to access your profile and learning progress.

deepsekChat.heroTitle: Deepsek Chat: Your AI Guide to Online Safety
deepsekChat.heroSubtitle: Understand and reduce digital threats through interactive scenarios.
deepsekChat.mission: Expand your knowledge for a safer online experience.
deepsekChat.howItWorksTitle: How Deepsek Helps You Stay Safe

safetyAreas.title: Phishing Scams
safetyAreas.description: Learn to recognize fake emails, messages, and websites designed to steal your information.

safetyAreas.title: Malware and Viruses
safetyAreas.description: Understand how malicious software works and how to protect your devices from infection.

safetyAreas.title: Deepfakes and Disinformation
safetyAreas.description: Develop critical thinking to identify manipulated media and false narratives online.

safetyAreas.title: Password Security
safetyAreas.description: Master the art of creating strong, unique passwords and managing them effectively.

safetyAreas.title: Social Engineering
safetyAreas.description: Recognize psychological manipulation tactics used by attackers to gain your trust.

safetyAreas.title: Privacy Concerns
safetyAreas.description: Understand your digital footprint and how to protect your personal data online.

deepsekChat.ctaTitle: Ready to enhance your online security?
deepsekChat.ctaDescription: Deepsek is here to guide you through the complexities of the digital world. Start your personalized security check today.
deepsekChat.footerText: Deepsek Chat is part of Digital Fortress, dedicated to creating a safer digital future for everyone.
